rationale: Council found fixed stop-loss is a near-wash (66 closed maker held -$46.93 vs stopped -$53.57). Theory why: a binary market's price IS the probability; remaining move scales ~sigma*sqrt(tau). For a buy-the-favorite (neg-skew) position, the loss tail (favorite->0) is only 'live' when tau is large; near close the outcome is nearly settled so a stop just pays spread for no tail-protection, and a winner should be HELD to $1 not sold at p<1. => exits (both stop AND take-profit) belong in the market's FIRST part; in the final stretch HOLD to settlement. A fixed stop that also fires near close (no benefit) explains the observed wash.
proposed_rule: tau-conditioned: define tau=min-to-close, total window W. If tau > k*W (early, k~0.25-0.4): stop-loss active (cut favorite breaking down, caps live tail) + take-profit active (lock gains before reversal). If tau <= k*W (final stretch): DISABLE both, hold to settlement. Refinement: also gate on moneyness (underlying distance from strike) - near-strike + near-close = max gamma = most dangerous, the one late case where a stop may still help.
backtest_plan: Replay every historical maker/shortcycle trade over its intra-window price path from D:/kalshi-ticks/*.db (14GB/day, index by ticker+ts). Compare tau-conditioned rule net P&L vs the actual fixed-stop outcome. Adopt ONLY if it beats fixed-stop with bootstrap CI lower bound > 0 over n>=100.
applicability: Most relevant to maker/short-cycle lanes (now OFF). Tie to maker-resurrection: if maker returns (per resurrection criteria), it should return WITH this tau-exit, not the current fixed stop. Not an urgent live change; h15 keeps its drawdown_step for now.
freeze_status: Stop-loss logic is FROZEN (CLAUDE.md #9) - this is design+backtest+register ONLY, no live change. 07-23 adjudication.

weather_correction: Main Fable OVERSTATED 'weather no edge'. codex caught a real bug in weather_calibration.py backfill (NO-side q_consensus = P(NO) was scored against YES outcome un-flipped, + voided rows included) -> false 'model 0.3236 > market 0.2952, both worse than 0.5'. FIXED (side-aware YES-convention). Corrected side-aware Brier (n=27): model 0.2344 vs market 0.2228. Split: W1/NWS-temp n=11 win 45.5% model 0.2637 > market 0.2035 = genuinely edgeless; W2/fade n=10 win 80% model 0.1825 < market 0.1860 = BEATS market, real candidate. Correct framing = 'W1 no edge, W2 UNPROVEN-but-promising' NOT 'weather no edge'. Still do NOT scale (n=10 too thin, +$3.17 92%-from-3-trades). W2 is the piece to grow/watch.
tau_exit_correction: codex DISAGREES with the tau-exit theory. Biggest hole: near-strike + near-close = high gamma / jump / toxic-flow means LATE cuts can be MORE valuable, so 'always hold to settlement late' is WRONG - the rule needs a moneyness gate (hold late only if FAR from strike; near-strike-late = dangerous coin-flip, may still warrant cut). Also the fixed-stop 'near-wash' has a SIMPLER explanation than the tau theory: exits at fair value are EV-neutral (reconstructed win% 48.0% ~= exit price 48.1%), so no tau theory is needed to explain it. Backtest plan under-specified: missing full entry set, fillable depth/latency/fees, moneyness/spot/vol, settlement, event-clustering, pre-registered out-of-sample; only 6 days of ticks. Revise before any 07-23 adoption.

verdict: 5/5 STANCE=A structural -EV. Clean ex-ante divergence split: |q_LLM - market| <=12pt => 6 trades 6/6 WIN +$0.93; >12pt => 3 trades 0/3 LOSE -$4.87 (GPT-5.6 fast-news -$4.53 + BEH -$0.34, same 'digest lacks decisive fact'). One mechanism firing 3x, not an accident. The +$0.59 'salvageable core' is n=1 luck (PLATNER +$0.63 = 68%; remove -> -$0.04; bootstrap CI [-0.74,+2.12] crosses zero). Code: fractional-Kelly sizes bet MONOTONE with divergence (heaviest when most likely wrong); only family-agreement gate (engine.py:33) not |q-market|; _half_anchor_ok + market_price_seen=false actively erase the outlier signal; verification is annotate-only (order code never reads it). Academic (KalshiBench 300Q): LLM Brier skill mostly negative; only positive mechanism is small-bet lose-less-when-wrong = OPPOSITE of CORE. Structural: I_LLM subset I_market => large divergence = adverse selection on fast-news; a gate truncates tail but does not create alpha.
